scripts.dev: sh -c 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; pnpm --filter @pluto-agent-platform/server dev:server & pnpm --filter @pluto-agent-platform/app dev'
scripts.demo:live:smoke: docker compose -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.auth.local.yml exec -T pluto-platform-live pnpm --filter @pluto-agent-platform/server exec tsx ../../docker/live-smoke.ts
scripts.docker:e2e:live: docker compose -f docker/compose.e2e-live.yml -f docker/compose.auth.local.yml up --build --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from pluto-platform-e2e-live
